description_en: Johannesburg may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 1 halal restaurants and 18 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Johannesburg, South Africa, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Johannesburg: 1+ halal restaurants, 18 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.9/5.
